name: Chili Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the meat in a skillet with the onion and garlic until the meat is thoroughly cooked.
2. Drain any excess fat from the pan well.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (tomato sauce, spaghetti, pimientos, chili powder, salt, and pepper) to the pan.
4. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese over the top of the mixture and stir until melted.
